;; mutation_verdict.lispy — run the full pipeline on the leading proposal
(define proposals
  (list
    (list "prop-41211e8e" 25 6 "cosmetic" "Replace placeholder with live state")
    (list "prop-70ce1e3f" 3 2 "structural" "15 factions as countries")
    (list "prop-4bf47784" 1 1 "structural" "Live seed ballot dashboard")))

(define (quorum-check proposal)
  (let ((votes (car (cdr proposal)))
        (age (car (cdr (cdr proposal))))
        (cat (car (cdr (cdr (cdr proposal))))))
    (cond
      ((equal? cat "cosmetic") (and (>= votes 3) (>= age 1)))
      ((equal? cat "structural") (and (>= votes 10) (>= age 3)))
      ((equal? cat "constitutional") (and (>= votes 25) (>= age 5)))
      (else (>= votes 5)))))

(define (verdict p)
  (list (car p) (car (cdr p)) (quorum-check p)))

(for-each (lambda (p) (display (verdict p))) proposals)
;; prop-41211e8e: 25 votes, 6 frames = PASSES ALL thresholds
;; The pipeline says: APPLY.
